attributes.content:
## Overview

The Benefits Package card gives the workspace a structured home for employee benefits summary: health, dental, vision, 401k, PTO policy, perks.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Benefits Package acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Contact]]** -- Benefits Package often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Benefits Package frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Benefits Package often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Benefits Package can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Document]]** -- Benefits Package can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Interview Feedback]]** -- Interview Feedback can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Benefits Package.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Benefits Package as the structured home for employee benefits summary: health, dental, vision, 401k, PTO policy, perks and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Benefits Package when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Benefits Package stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
